textByHashes.df605d4db8c578826b48d1f0f1a916118ccf3470: The party room is a silly place!
textByHashes.a3b1b3f70e586a048c52374dfbf56fb62b1c9c19: Hi! I'm Party Pete. Welcome to the Party Room!
textByHashes.b9ab2023c6179a46d2f8365d834c78e5f4af7a43: This room is for partying the night away!
textByHashes.0af0fcadc0514b453536481361a6c7e5d22c1d59: Get a few mates round, get the beers in and have fun!
textByHashes.24beb49ad9b441519e8be1aa53dcf1dd4e51db0d: Some players organise parties so keep an eye open!
textByHashes.ef8f69e97c2e42dd5d253b76d8c11b855a77cece: Simple. With the lever you can do some fun stuff.
textByHashes.8f61e88f7315b6bb496918890916f4bacbdee2ad: A balloon drop costs 1000 gold. For this you get 200 balloons dropped across the whole of the party room. You can then have fun popping the balloons! If there are items in the Party Drop Chest they will be inside
textByHashes.cf76bac67c01f7bae24564b229892dd22299cedc: the balloons! For 500 gold you can summon the Party Room Knights who will dance for your delight.
textByHashes.aee6ecc054e696553aa92e3e830efb0c3c1ce4b5: Their singing isn't a delight though!
textByHashes.dc66298e9d8938339167432a409698c91908d75d: Any items that are in the chest will be dropped inside the balloons when you pull the lever!
textByHashes.46681a38cdb2828a9cd203e76e0e6632a264fe69: A word of warning though. Any items that you put into the chest can't be taken out again and it costs 1000 gold pieces for each balloon drop.
textByHashes.a86e95771000897bfd3ffd78b54c8b9c76e196df: We used to be in Seers' Village, far to the west, but we had to move - the seers were complaining about the noise level, and the knights of Camelot got it into their heads that the Party Room knights were making fun of
textByHashes.321150507bd96077833c37e8c0e44b9da084d857: We're doing well here, though. The people of Falador are happy we're here, and we've hardly ever had the White Knights telling us to keep the noise down.
textByHashes.7a4e072b6ac4294e117100d0acaad73081221211: We're going to turn Falador into the party capital of Gielinor!
textByHashes.3e3bf3672616bfb93de3ab983a80f1f00e55b40e: I've won the Dance Trophy at the Kandarin Ball three years in a trot!
textByHashes.30c4ffc466502197dc21681ed8409464a39d5aea: You've come to the right place!
textByHashes.71a27e1728b5ee76588af77f87f71f0cb4aea4a6: Want to take some cake with you?
